items.name_en: Siena Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
Siena Shoulder Bag
▫️Model 846705 Black
▫️Dimensions 22.5*14*8
The Gucci Siena small shoulder bag continues the evolution of the brand's iconic Horsebit element. Crafted from fine glossy leather, this bag features a structured silhouette with a half-horsebit buckle detail inspired by the 1970s. It is accented with gold-tone hardware and features a three-compartment interior with a zip pocket.

items.name_en: Jackie Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
Jackie Shoulder Bag
▫️Model 820415
▫️Dimensions 27.5*19*4
Gucci's new Jackie 1961 series tells a brand story across eras with its iconic push-lock and classic silhouette. This handbag is crafted from exquisite leather, interpreting timeless elegance with a modern style.

Genuine leather
▫️Model 855371 Small
▫️Dimensions 23*17*9
Gucci New Fall/Winter Collection The brand's iconic GG Marmont series artfully blends classic double-G elements and fluted chain straps to create a soft yet structured silhouette. This piece is crafted from soft, lightweight quilted V-shaped calfskin.

items.name_en: Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
items.name_cn:
Genuine leather [New] Quilted Mini Bag from the GG Marmont series. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather, a structured body, a flap closure, and double-G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain can be easily adjusted between a shoulder strap (55cm) and a top handle (30cm) for use as a shoulder bag or handbag. It can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Dimensions: 22(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Light Pink / Genuine leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick.

items.name_en: Original leather [New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability design, neutral light beige quilted V-shaped leather material, a slightly structured body, a flap closure, and double G accessories. This bag features a versatile carrying design, easily switching between a shoulder bag and a handbag by sliding the metal chain. Light beige quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold-tone hardware, suede microfiber lining, double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm high) or top handle (30cm high). Also usable as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.

items.name_en: , [Extended Shoulder Strap] 🥰 New GG brand series continues the design philosophy that items should not only be popular for a season, but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to inject brand identity charm into new designs. This Ophidia small bag features the historic GG Supreme canvas material, with double G accessories. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, brown leather trim, double G, adjustable top handle, top zip closure. Model: 735145. Dimensions: 21*19*5cm. Color: Brown/pvc. Italian creation

items.name_en: Ophidia Small Handbag Monogram (with Crossbody Strap)
items.name_cn:
Ophidia Small Handbag Monogram (with Crossbody Strap)
The GG logo evolved from the Gucci diamond quilted pattern of the 1930s and has since become a traditional symbol of the brand. This small handbag from the new Ophidia collection incorporates this highly recognizable pattern. Double G accessories add charm to the overall look.
Dimensions: 15.5*25*6cm
Style No.: 735132

items.name_en: 🌷 Style No. 735145. The new GG brand collections continue the design philosophy that items should not only be trendy for one season but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to infuse the brand's iconic charm into new designs. This Ophidia small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas material and is equipped with double G accessories.

items.name_en: Model: 499623 Red
items.name_cn:
Model: 499623 Red
Size: 25x14x8cm
Gucci Dionysus Diamond-Clasp
True fan favorite, absolutely stunning.
Preserves the perfect lineage of the Dionysus bag,
but ushers in a new era of Dionysus leather!
The most valuable part of the bag is the tiger head diamond clasp.
A treasure item. Not a market item.
Very light, perfect size, highly recommended.
